nN.description: Total number of nodes in the supply network (suppliers, transshipment points, and beneficiary camps)

node_type.description: Type of each node: 0 = supplier, 1 = transshipment point, 2 = beneficiary camp

E.description: Adjacency matrix indicating whether a directed edge exists between each pair of nodes

dem.description: Number of beneficiaries at each node (0 for non-beneficiary nodes)

pc.description: Procurement cost per kg of each commodity

tc.description: Transportation cost per kg of each commodity along each edge

nutreq.description: Per-person nutritional requirement for each nutrient

nutval.description: Nutritional value per kg of each commodity for each nutrient
